activated_rules.rule_name: General goods description with invoice reference

consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Bulten Sweden AB' and country 'Sweden' in the certificate exactly match consignor information and address blocks found in the invoice, including postal address and VAT number. Land matches after normalization. No conflicting information found.

consignee.certificate_value: ZJK Volvo Car Engine Mfg. Co., Ltd
consignee.invoice_value: ZJK Volvo Car Engine Mfg. Co., Ltd
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'ZJK Volvo Car Engine Mfg. Co., Ltd' and country 'China' from the certificate correspond to the invoice's 'Delivery address' and other consignee fields. Invoice explicitly lists this as consignee. Land normalization confirms China equality.

goods_description.motivation: Goods description in certificate is general ('1 pallet fasteners') with explicit invoice reference (Invoice No.: 754129), allowing acceptance of invoice description without exact matching text per product. Invoice contains detailed description 'Other fasteners, threaded, steel' on invoice 754129, confirming match.

quantity.motivation: Quantity in certificate is 167kg listed as gross weight. Invoice explicitly confirms gross weight 167 kg. Certificate quantity is verified against invoice total gross weight with exact numeric match. Units and weight category consistency confirmed.

origin.motivation: Certificate states origin as Sweden. Invoice contains explicit origin code 'SE' matching Sweden, with 'Origin' field present. EU origin normalization applied, confirming Sweden as EU member. No conflicting origin information found.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points including consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity and origin are verified as matching between certificate and invoice without discrepancies.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla uppgifter i certifikatet stämmer överens med fakturan. Avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland kan verifieras utan avvikelser. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
